annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under O.C.G.A. § 7-4-15 — 7% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Georgia’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
